falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates a confirmed blowoff top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict by proving a clear trend reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above $X (specific resistance level) by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A decisive breakout above a key resistance level by 5% would invalidate the HOLD signal, proving the market has moved beyond the pattern's expected range and into a new phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A drop in pattern similarity below 60% would mean the current market behavior no longer aligns with the bottom_2024_aug pattern, falsifying the UNKNOWN verdict by showing the pattern has broken down.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
